name: retrieve_call_information
description: Retrieves a point-in-time snapshot of a specific slack call's information.

id.description:
Unique identifier of the Slack call for which to retrieve information. This ID is typically returned when a call is initiated (e.g., by the `calls.add` method).
Example: "R1234567890"

arguments.description: Request model for retrieving information about a specific Slack call.
